name: German Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Prepared apple pie filling (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together as per package directions.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the top springs back when touched gently.
4. Cool completely.
5. Top with whipped cream and sprinkle with cinnamon.
